emails.subject: FW: US West Power Pop-up Announcement

emails.subject: RE: US West Power Pop-up Announcement
emails.body: RE: US West Power Pop-up Announcement Kal, The delivery points are as follows: Mid-C, NP-15, SP-15, and PV And, Products will currently be available for HE 12 through HE 20 Pacific Prevailing Time (PPT), for Monday through Friday. I appreciate the hard work. Thanks, Bill Williams Short Term West Hourly Trading 503-464-3730 To: Williams III, Bill

emails.subject: RE: US West Power Pop-up Announcement
emails.body: RE: US West Power Pop-up Announcement Kal please ensure you send this information to Bill Williams III. I have forwarded it to him via this message. To: Williams, Bill
